Title: List Containers
Description: Show all Docker containers including stopped ones

Title: Docker Compose Up
Description: Start services defined in docker-compose.yml in background

Title: Docker Compose Down
Description: Stop and remove all containers from docker-compose.yml

Title: Docker Compose Logs
Description: Follow live log output from all compose services

Title: Container Logs
Description: Follow live log output from a named container

Title: Shell into Container
Description: Open an interactive shell inside a running container

Title: Pull Image
Description: Download a Docker image from a registry

Title: Remove Stopped Containers
Description: Delete all stopped containers without confirmation prompt

Title: List Images
Description: List all locally available Docker images

Title: Remove Unused Images
Description: Remove all images not used by any container
